message:
fix(core): fix 3 nondeterministic swarm_work_queue test failures

- item_with_multiple_deps_needs_all_completed: use assign() instead of
  pull() to target specific items when multiple have same priority
- diamond_dependency_unblocking: same fix for all three pull→complete
  pairs in the diamond DAG test
- timed_out_items_reclaimed: add 2ms sleep to ensure elapsed > 0 when
  heartbeat_timeout_ms is 0 (same-millisecond race)

All 45 swarm_work_queue tests now pass deterministically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
